benefits.description: significant weight loss achieved, weight goal overshot initially
maintaining weight loss without significant regain despite lower winter activity

protocol_notes: History: peaked at 3.2mg/week (very short-lived), averaged under 2mg during weight loss phase. Currently at 1mg/week maintenance. Planning to cycle off entirely during summer with high activity, likely resume in winter. Considering switching to Tirzepatide for future use. Average weight loss achieved without relying on glucagon aspect of Reta (which requires 5-6mg/week).
